tags.name: alert-dialog
tags.description:
A representation of an alert presentation.
Use it from the client module like `void alert('Save failed.')`.

Value Type: “”
Description: A value that describes the purpose of a button

tags.name: confirmation-dialog
tags.description:
A representation of a confirmation presentation.
Use it from the client module like `await confirmation(trigger, 'Permanently erase the items in the Trash?')`.

tags.description: A message with a title and extra information that you show when part of your app can’t be used.

tags.description: A view with two or three side-by-side sections, where what you choose in the left section changes what appears in the next section.

tags.description: A view that shows a main screen and lets you open other screens on top of it.

Description: style

tags.description: A view that shows the progress toward completion of a task.

tags.description: A screen that lets users switch between different views using buttons, tabs, or other controls.

tags.description: Display selectable, sortable data arranged in rows and columns.
